name: Family Restroom
description: To access this restroom on an event day, please visit the usher stationed at this location for assistance.

name: Accessible Parking
description: Guests with a valid parking placard, hangtag, or vehicle sticker are able to park in our accessible spaces. Guests parking in accessible spaces do not need to have a prepaid pass for NFL games, parking can be paid for with cash or credit upon arrival. Guests parking in accessible spaces for all other events will pay upon arrival to the lot.

name: Nursing Suite
description: To access this suite on an event day, please visit the usher at section 144 for assistance.

name: MetLife 50 Club
description: This location varies in access on an event basis. For more information please call the MetLife Stadium Box Office. During New York Jets games, guests sitting in section 139 only will have access to the club and its amenities below. For New York Giants games, the club is accessible to the public at the beginning of the 2nd quarter.

name: Box Office
description: The Box Office is open Monday through Friday with select hours in addition to being open on event days with our Will Call.

name: West VIP Lobby
description: West VIP provides access to the Miller Lite MVP Club, Commissioner's Club, The Green Room, Suites 3-50 through 3-80, 5-50 through 5-80, and 6-50 through 6-80.

name: Boardwalk Fryer
description:
Chicken Tender Basket, Fried Clams, Thumann’s Hot Dogs, Fries, Cheese Fries, 
Soft Drinks, Hot Chocolate, Draft Beer

name: Thumanns Franks
description:
Thumann’s Stadium Dog, Pretzel Braid, Popcorn, Candy, Peanuts, Potato Chips, 
Hot Chocolate, Coffee, Value Meal Hot Dog, Value Popcorn, Value Soft Drink, 
Value Pretzel, Soft Drinks, Draft Beer

name: Coaches Club
description: The Coaches Club opens the same time as the stadium gates for all events. Guests sitting in sections 111C through 115C have access to the club. *Please note only rows 15 and below in 111C and 115C have access for a New York Jets game.*

name: Mrs. Fields
description:
Cookies, Brownies, Bottled Soft Drinks, 
Hot Chocolate

name: The Fat Rooster
description:
Spicy Chicken Sandwich, Specialty Topped Fries, Popcorn, Candy, Peanuts, 
Chicken Drummies with House Made Honey Mustard (Available at Section 317 
location only), Chips, Draft Beer, Soft Drinks, Hot Chocolate, Buttermilk & Hot 
Sauce Brine

name: New York Cheese Steak Company
description:
Cheesesteak, Fries, Cheese Fries, Chicken Tender Basket, Soft Drinks, Hot 
Chocolate, Draft Beer

name: Lucky's
description:
Asian Noodles, Dumplings, Meat Skewers, 
Bottled Soft Drinks, Bottled Beer

name: Shah's Halal
description:
Beef and chicken gyros, Bottled Soft Drinks, 
Bottled Beer

name: Mr. Tot
description: Loaded tots, cauliflower tots

name: Liberty Sandwich
description:
Premio Sausage, The Kitchen Sink, Bottled 
Soft Drinks, Bottled Beer

name: Tacos Roqueros
description:
Tacos, Burritos, Tostadas (Pollo, Beef, Pork 
Carnitas or Wild Mushroom), Rice & Beans, 
Bottled Soft Drinks, Bottled Beer, Malt 
Beverage (Bud Light Ritas, etc)

name: Local Pizza
description:
Cheese Pizza, Pepperoni Pizza, Pretzel Braid, Soft Drinks, Hot Chocolate, Draft 
Beer

name: Legacy Museum
description: The Legacy Museum is open during New York Giants games only. The museum will close at the end of half time during the New York Giants games.

name: Guest Services Booth
description: This location provides: seating assistance, lost and found, guest comment forms, first event certificates, charging stations, and more. Looking for a lost item? Call the Guest Services Hotline or email to info@metlifestadium.com.

links.label: New York Giants First Game Certificate
New York Jets First Game Certificate

name: Team Store
description: The team store is only open on event days. For assistance with merchandise, please call the Delaware North Retail department.

name: Suite 2-01
description: For suite rental inquiries, call our Premium Services Hotline.

name: Suite 2-02
description: For suite rental inquiries, call our Premium Services Hotline.

name: Suite 2-03
description: For suite rental inquiries, call our Premium Services Hotline.

name: Charging Station
description: ChargeFuze provides cellphone chargers available for rent at the stadium. Renting is $5 per hour and will max out at $45 if the device is not returned.

name: Moody's Commissioners Club
description: Guests sitting in this club will be able to enter into the stadium when gates open for each event! Food and beverage comes included with tickets purchased to the club.

name: The Wingman NYC
description:
Traditional and Boneless Wings with Buffalo, 
Hot Honey BBQ, & Garlic Parmesan sauces, 
Soft Drinks, Bottled Beer

name: Nonna Fusco's Kitchen
description: Meatball Sandwich, Bottled Soft Drinks, Bottled Beer, Chicken Cutlet Sandwich

name: Global Pies
description:
Assortment of Empanadas, Meat Pies, 
Vegetarian Pies, Soft Drinks, Draft Beer

name: New York Delicatessen
description:
Value Turkey Wrap Meal, Pastrami Hoagie, Corned Beef Hoagie, Thumann’s 
Stadium Dog, Fresh Fruit Cup, Knish, Soft Drinks, Hot Chocolate, Draft Beer

name: Reverse ATM
description: To reduce touchpoints, MetLife Stadium is a cash-free venue. NO CASH will be accepted at concession stands and retail locations. Pay with a debit or credit card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover) using tap to pay, chip or swipe, or mobile payment, including Apple Pay and Google Pay.

name: Concierge Desk
description: This location provides: seating assistance, lost and found, guest comment forms, first event certificates, experience buttons, cellphone charging, and more.

links.label: New York Giants First Game Certificate
New York Jets First Game Certificate

name: 111c
description: This seating section has access to the Coaches Club for non NFL events and New York Giants games. For New York Jets games, rows 15 and below will have access.
